markdown:
#  Resource Tracking And Project Financials Setup Guide 
Table of Contents 
##  Record Changes on an Internal Budget Change 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Budget** tool.
  2. Click the **Budget Changes** tab.
  3. Click **Create.**
  4. Under the 'Production Quantity Adjustment section, click **Add Adjustment.**
  5. Enter the line item data.
  6. Click **Save**.

title: Resource Tracking And Project Financials Setup Guide - Record Changes on an Internal Budget Change
description: How to set up your project and budget to leverage Procore's unit-based columns and Resource Tracking tools to track real-time labor costs on a project's budget line items. | Record Changes on an Internal Budget Change
